services.name: Bridal Glam
services.description: Our signature bridal service includes luxury skin preparation with serums and moisturizers, premium false lashes, a personalized touch-up kit, and body glow for a cohesive red-carpet-ready look.

services.name: Soft Glam
services.description: Effortless elegance with custom underpainting, soft eyeshadow blending, lash application, and coordinated lip color combination.

services.name: Natural Beat
services.description: Fresh, understated beauty that enhances your natural features with light coverage, natural lash application, and subtle contouring.

services.name: Photoshoot Makeup
services.description: Camera-ready perfection with HD foundation, multiple makeup look options, on-set touch-ups, and premium full lash sets.

services.name: Home Service
services.description: We bring luxury to you. Professional in-home makeup services within Abuja with all products and tools included.

services.name: Group/Event Glam
services.description: Perfect for bridal parties, events, and celebrations. Custom quotes based on group size and event requirements.

serviceInclusions: 12+ hour wear guarantee with setting sprays
